Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFFS NURIA RIVERA AND RUIZ, HERMES ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES' Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories (General And Employment) Set One and for sanctions.
Granted. Defendant must respond substantively to Number 12.1. "Incident" is not too vague to permit a response, as to Plaintiff's claim. Defendant must also respond to Number 15.1 as to its affirmative defenses. Sanctions awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $500.00 Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)
